name: Lucifer
description:
The beauty of the enemy

Exorcist Angel!User

Requested by: [Anonymous]

I have a request form open!

It may come as a shock to some but my Bramble, my oc, is actually a wasp not a bee she just makes herself look like a bee

Fun fact: 12-13 sessions of Cognitive behavioural therapy is the typical ending point for a majority of peoples treatment

If you encounter any problems do tell me please ^^

The base character personality and scenario were lifted and edited from @fishiewishes
